error_signature: workflow never continues after wait node
title: Wait node not continuing execution
symptom: The workflow hangs indefinitely at the wait node when waiting for a specified time.
not_this_if: Using the wait node with correct date/time format
Running in an environment without execution time limits
root_cause: The wait node requires a specific date/time format to function correctly. Using an incorrect format can cause the workflow to not recognize the intended wait time, leading to indefinite execution.
fix_steps: Change the date/time format in the wait node from 'yyyy-MM-dd 08:30:00' to 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'
Test the workflow again to ensure it continues after the wait period
agent_instruction: Update the wait node's date/time format to 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' and re-test the workflow.
